title: diuris minor
intro: Diuris minor, also known as the common fritillary or lesser fritillary, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, relieving urinary tract issues, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Diuris minor can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and capsules, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
